mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM products ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM products WHERE LOWER(category) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM products WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{name}) || '%' ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM products WHERE stock IS NOT NULL AND stock > 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM products WHERE stock IS NULL OR stock <= 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT products_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO products (id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
